# backend api review template

## API summary

What changed and what callers depend on.

## Must fix

- Issue — impact — likely direction
- Issue — impact — likely direction

## Should improve

- Improvement — reason

## Contract risks

- Compatibility or behavior risk

- Access, tenancy, or data-exposure concern

- Ready
- Ready with caution
- Not ready
